step_by_step_thinking:
Tool Call: retrieve("chemical components of heroin")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

Based on the retrieved information, I concur with my previous stance (\boxed{B}) asserting that Acetyl Morphine (among options) appears specifically in heroin due to its formation through initial metabolic pathways. While thorough documentation confirms heroin's synthesis involves converting morphine to Acetyl Morphine before further degradation back toward pure morphine, this intermediary stage indicates inclusion rather than mere presence as final outcome alone post-consumption.
This reinforces prior conclusions noting key differences - notably Absent ASAs completely, Pentazocines excluded except indirectly possibly through cross-substances mixtures, whereas Propoxyphenes aren't intrinsic nor produced despite sharing similar roles functionally speaking. Thus confirming initial inference standing firm irrespective contextual nuances explored herein. So reaffirming selection B appropriately encapsulates accuracy within provided alternatives under scrutiny here today !
